title: [LCI] Fix proxying deviation from spec §17 in Zephyr/Rust
description: Update LCI proxy behavior in lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/ and rust/lichen-client or gateway to exactly match Local Client Interface spec in spec/11-lci.md §17. Remove deviations. Reference project-LICHEN-f4xg and project-LICHEN-s3t5.
